title: Casabe Crusted Pork Chops with Smoky Gratin
description: A hearty, German-inspired dish featuring crispy pork chops topped with a smoky gratin and served alongside a side of crispy casabe.
instructions: Season the pork chops with salt, pepper, and smoky paprika.
In a shallow dish, mix together the crushed casabe and flour.
Dredge the pork chops in the casabe mixture, coating evenly.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the pork chops.
Sear the pork chops for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer to a baking sheet.
Bake the pork chops in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the pork chops are baking, prepare the gratin.
In a separate skillet, sauté the sliced onion and minced garlic until softened.
Transfer the onion mixture to a baking dish and top with shredded gratin cheese.
Return the gratin to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve the pork chops atop the smoky gratin and enjoy!
